# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User's hardware is a GE MCDU. It supports a full 8-color palette via bits 21-23 of the control word (0:Black, 1:Cyan, 2:Red, 3:Yellow, 4:Green, 5:Magenta, 6:Amber, 7:White). It handles attributes (Reversed, Underscore, Flashing) via bits 14-16. Empty box graphic is mapped to char 0xD1.
